subject: Re: MCore all scores are 0 and nothing is refined
body:
Hi Simon,

This is strange - I haven't personally seen this. Have opened an issue on
GitHub to track: https://github.com/warpem/warp/issues/284

If any useful info comes up when troubleshooting please follow up in the
issue!

Cheers,

Alister


On Tue, 29 Oct 2024 at 12:25, Simon Jenni <jenni@crystal.harvard.edu> wrote:

> Running MCore e.g. like this:
>
> MCore \
> --population m_run01/population_01.population \
> --refine_imagewarp 4x4 \
> --refine_particles \
> --refine_stageangles \
> --refine_volumewarp 4x4x2x10 \
> --ctf_defocus \
> --perdevice_refine 1
>
> Randomly, as it appears, all the refinement scores are 0 (see log file for
> one tiltseries below) and nothing is refined. This is after previous
> refinement runs of the same population/source/species were just fine. The
> program runs to the end and without generating any error. Has anyone
> observed also observed this?
>
> All the best, Simon
>
> m_run01/refinement_temp/logs/refine_Position_1_2.log
>
